summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 記憶體需求強勁與 KeyBanc 分析師給予 60 % 上漲空間的樂觀評級，Micron 透過擴大台灣產能與 HBM 4 出貨維持成長動能。

bullish.title: Micron Stock Jumps After Bullish Call-- KeyBanc Sees 60% Upside
bullish.reason: KeyBanc 分析師給予高度正面評價，預測股價有 60 % 上漲空間，並上調獲利預測，直接驅動市場買盤。

bullish.title: Micron Expands Taiwan DRAM Footprint To Capture Long Term AI Demand
bullish.reason: 收購 Powerchip 的台中 P5 廠區，顯示公司積極擴充產能以應對長期 AI 記憶體需求，具備實質基本面利多。

bullish.title: Micron’s AI Memory Bet Grows As HBM4 Sells Out And Debt Falls
bullish.reason: HBM 4 記憶體出貨量大且銷售一空，同時債務下降，改善財務結構並鞏固在 AI 供應鏈的地位。

bullish.title: Micron Is One Of The Most Affordable Growth Stocks Right Now
bullish.reason: 被列為未來 5 年最具成長潛力的平價成長股之一，吸引長期價值型投資人關注。

bearish.title: Micron Is Slumping and Rival’s $10 Billion US Listing Won’t Help
bearish.reason: 競爭對手即將在美上市，可能分食市場份額並對 Micron 股價造成估值壓力。

bearish.title: Nvidia's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chips Still Need Memory. Here's Why the Micron Sell-Off Has Gone Too Far.
bearish.reason: 提及 Google 推出 TurboQuant 後導致股價動能減弱，反映市場對技術競爭的敏感度。

bearish.title: 1 Chart Investors Needs to See Before Buying Micron Technology Stock
bearish.reason: 提醒投資人記憶體需求波動劇烈，歷史週期性風險仍是潛在的負面因素。

neutral.title: Virgin Galactic, Broadcom, UnitedHealth, Micron Technology And Netflix: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱門股清單，未提供具體影響股價的實質消息。

neutral.title: Premarket movers: CF Industries, Exxon Mobil, Nvidia, Micron Technology
neutral.reason: 盤前交易動態報導，屬於例行性市場資訊。
